description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespace if needed. Update all related Spring dependencies (Spring Security, Spring Data, Spring Cloud) to compatible versions. Ensure compatibility with Java 21 language features and virtual threads where applicable.
tasks.summary: Successfully upgraded Java from 8 to 21 and Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5. Migrated javax.persistence.* and javax.validation.* to jakarta.* namespaces. Updated code to use modern Java 21 APIs (isEmpty(), getFirst(), formatted()). Build passes and unit tests pass (1/1).
